title: Spuddy10345/whisper-raycast-extension
summary: Effortlessly convert your speech to text directly within Raycast using the power of whisper.cpp. This extension provides a simple interface to record audio, transcribe and refine it locally, privately on your machine. Refine the text with custom prompts privately using ollama, or additionally with Raycast AI or any v1 (OpenAI) compatible API.

title: rouges78/GameStringer
summary: Desktop app that auto-detects a game's engine, extracts the text, translates it with local or cloud AI, and re-applies the patch. 20+ engines, 20+ AI providers, 11 UI languages. Free & source-available, single-player focused.

title: rahulbhardwaj94/uvaach
summary: Fully local, open-source voice dictation for macOS (Apple Silicon). On-device Whisper + Ollama — an open-source Wispr Flow alternative. No cloud, no subscription.

title: dadachi/turnpilot
summary: Live queue-ops copilot for walk-in shops — offline local-Gemma-4 advisories with a one-tap Accept/Override loop. Not a dashboard.

title: GoodbyePlanet/semcode
summary: Semantic code-search (semcode) MCP. Indexes code symbols and commit history. Combines dense embeddings with sparse BM25 vectors for hybrid search that balances semantic understanding with keyword precision.
